flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Augsburg University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (45.1% → 40.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Augsburg University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (58.1% → 51.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Augsburg University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.0k → $45.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Augsburg University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.0k → $45.5k).
